title: Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple
tagline: Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Siddhivinayaka Mahaganapati Temple is a Hindu temple located in Titwala, a small town in the Kalyan taluka of Thane district – near Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: The Siddhivinayaka Mahaganapati Temple is a Hindu temple located in Titwala, a small town in the Kalyan taluka of Thane district – near Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. The temple is dedicated to the Hindu, elephant-headed god of wisdom, Ganesha. Titwala is believed to be the putative site of the hermitage of sage Kanva, foster parent of Shakuntala who was born here. The place is steeped in ancient legend and the temple is frequented by a very large number of devotees on account of the belief that separated married couples could be united and marriages of desired people could be fixed easily if the

topPlaces.name: Titwala
topPlaces.description: Titwala (Titvala) ( Pronounced: ) is a town near Kalyan in the Indian state of Maharashtra, Located in Thane District. Titwala is famous for the Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple, where lakhs of devotees visit this temple to take auspicious blessings of Lord Ganesha during the auspicious days of Ganesh Chaturthi and Angarki Sankashti Chaturthi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Siddhivinayak Mahaganapati Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Titwala, Chiradpada, Devale, Mawal, Pise, Bhiwandi, Sange, Bhiwandi.
